output.explanation: After extensive searching, I'm unable to find a SPARQL query that successfully retrieves works for piano based on works of Schubert in the Doremus knowledge graph. The main challenges are: 1) The property 'is derivative of' (efrbroo:R2_is_derivative_of) doesn't seem to be effectively linking works to their derivatives in this dataset; 2) There's no clear property to identify works for piano; 3) The entity for Schubert doesn't appear to have the expected relationships to his works in the way I would expect. The data structure and available properties in the Doremus knowledge graph do not appear to support this query effectively.
output.formatted:
After extensive searching, I'm unable to find a SPARQL query that successfully retrieves works for piano based on works of Schubert in the Doremus knowledge graph. The main challenges are: 1) The property 'is derivative of' (efrbroo:R2_is_derivative_of) doesn't seem to be effectively linking works to their derivatives in this dataset; 2) There's no clear property to identify works for piano; 3) The entity for Schubert doesn't appear to have the expected relationships to his works in the way I would expect. The data structure and available properties in the Doremus knowledge graph do not appear to support this query effectively.

SPARQL query over doremus:
```sparql
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work efrbroo:R2_is_derivative_of <http://data.doremus.org/track/1c4512e0-3c29-3ca6-bd58-69f46b74a5a4> }
```

Using entities:
- SCHUBERT (http://data.doremus.org/track/1c4512e0-3c29-3ca6-bd58-69f46b74a5a4)

Using properties:
- is derivative of (efrbroo:R2_is_derivative_of), also known as "R2 is derivative of"

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.35s
